info.title: Test-Jedi API
info.description: REST API for Test-Jedi — a test management platform. Covers authentication, test repository, test runs, test plans, analytics, integrations, exports, and admin operations.

tags.name: Test Runs
tags.description: Test run lifecycle and execution updates

tags.name: Test Plans
tags.description: Plan management, approval, baseline and versions

AutomationImportRequest.description: Flexible payload for Playwright/Jest/Cypress JSON or parsed JUnit XML
